name: Tic Tac Toe
author: Poki
description: Tic Tac Toe brings a fresh twist to the classic game everyone loves! Choose from single-player, multiplayer, or local play modes and enjoy endless fun for all ages. Win games to unlock unique features and cool skins, adding style to every match. Challenge friends, face off against AI opponents, and climb the leaderboards to prove you’re the ultimate Tic Tac Toe master. Ready to claim your spot at the top? How to play Tic Tac Toe? Click to place mark. Who created Tic Tac Toe? Tic Tac Toe is created by InfinityGames.io. Play their other games on Poki: Energy , Infinity Loop: Hex , Merge Shapes , Shapes , Solitaire , Spider Solitaire , Sudoblocks , Laser Quest , Wood Blocks 3D , Classic Chess , and Maze: Path of Light ! How can I play Tic Tac Toe for free? You can play Tic Tac Toe for free on Poki. Can I play Tic Tac Toe on mobile devices and desktop? Tic Tac Toe can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Tic Tac Toe with my friend? Yes! Tic Tac Toe is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online or at the same computer!
